open_findings: Deny: Block VM SKU Sizes — blocks VM SKU sizes (assignment instance 1; resource types unresolved)
Deny: Block VM SKU Sizes — blocks VM SKU sizes (assignment instance 2; resource types unresolved)
Deny: Block VM SKU Sizes — blocks VM SKU sizes (assignment instance 3; resource types unresolved)
Deny: Deny AKS deployment with agent pool count greater than 10 — blocks Microsoft.ContainerService/managedClusters
Deny: Deny VMSS deployment with instance count greater than 10 — blocks Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachineScaleSets
Deny: Block Azure OpenAI Provisioned Capacity — blocks Microsoft.CognitiveServices/accounts/deployments
Deny: Block Azure Sentinel Commitment over 100 — blocks Microsoft.OperationalInsights/workspaces
Deny: Deny Azure Key Vault Managed HSM with Purge Protection Enabled — blocks Microsoft.KeyVault/managedHSMs
Deny: Block Azure RM Resource Creation — blocks classic compute/network/storage resource types
Deny: JV-Enforce Resource Group Tags — blocks Microsoft.Resources/subscriptions/resourceGroups without required tags

Governance challenger pass 1 returned NEEDS_REVISION with 6 must-fix, 8 should-fix, 3 suggestions; revision pass deduplicated JSON findings, corrected storage/VM/HSM mappings, and surfaced RG tag confirmation as the remaining manual blocker.

decision_log.decision: Step 1 Requirements approved on Pass 2 with 8 accepted fixes (REQ-C-01,03..09) and 1 deferred (REQ-C-02 blob retention class split)
decision_log.rationale: Challenger pass 2 returned APPROVED / low risk; deferred item flagged in Open Risks for Architect to address in Step 2 cost estimate

decision_log.decision: App Service Plan P1v3 Linux with AZ for 99.95% compute SLA and VNet integration
decision_log.rationale: P1v3 supports AZ + VNet integration + HTTP/2 + Always-On; required to meet 500-peak-user + p95<500ms NFR

decision_log.decision: Azure SQL DB Standard S3 (100 DTU, 250 GB) DTU-based tier replacing initial Serverless plan
decision_log.rationale: Pricing MCP could not resolve GP Serverless Gen5 in swedencentral; user directed switch to DTU model. S3 gives 100 DTU headroom for 3x peak; S2 (50 DTU) tracked as 3.56/mo budget-saver alternative

decision_log.decision: Storage Account Standard_ZRS Hot (NOT GRS) with lifecycle to Cool at 90 days
decision_log.rationale: ZRS satisfies EU Data Boundary residency by avoiding cross-region replication; soft-delete + versioning meets RPO 24h

decision_log.decision: Three private endpoints (SQL/Blob/KV) as secure-plus baseline; defer Front Door WAF in favor of Public-Edge Baseline compensating controls
decision_log.rationale: Within budget; PE protects PII. WAF deferred per REQ network table; auth + rate-limit + access restrictions + diagnostics replace Front Door for MVP

decision_log.decision: Defer CMK, DDoS Standard, multi-region DR to post-MVP / Challenge 4
decision_log.rationale: Not required for GDPR MVP scope; preserves €500 envelope; revisit when budget rises to €700

decision_log.decision: Architecture diagram generated using transactional Draw.io MCP workflow
decision_log.rationale: Single add-cells call with 30 cells (22 vertices + 8 edges), finish-diagram resolves 12 Azure icons; file passes validation 0 errors
10 resources + RG tag Deny gate + 3 PEs warrant per-phase approval; user confirmed dev environment

decision_log.decision: Plan revision r2 auto-applied 4 must_fix findings (UAMI phase 1, Easy Auth + admin split, PE-safe SQL grant, per-phase bicepparam)
decision_log.rationale: must_fix is mandatory per adversarial-review-protocol Stage 1; user requested revision against approved governance constraints

decision_log.decision: Plan r2 Stage 2 decided: 8 should_fix accepted, 3 deferred (rate-limit, load-test, SQL LTR). 11 total findings closed.
decision_log.rationale: User-directed per askQuestions batch; deferrals carried into Open Risks table for Step 5/6 visibility.

decision_log.decision: Step 5 governance gate override: proceed with resolved 9-key resource-group tag minimum for JV-Enforce Resource Group Tags.
decision_log.rationale: The Deny policy did not expose exact parameters, but Step 3.5 resolved the inherited Modify tag set and the user selected Override and proceed in the Step 5 governance gate.

decision_log.decision: Project restart: next step set to 04g-Governance; steps 4 (IaC Plan) and 5 (IaC Code) reset to pending
decision_log.rationale: User-directed restart at the Governance phase; prior plan/code artifacts will be regenerated against fresh governance constraints. Historical decisions retained in the audit trail.
